smartMode.title: Smart Mode
smartMode.description: Automatically sweeps Meta Ad Library using a built-in library of 100+ DTC-specific phrases across all verticals (beauty, supplements, fashion, accessories/belts, food, fitness, pet, home, tech, baby). Ignores Search Terms when enabled.

sweepVerticals.title: Sweep Verticals (Smart Mode only)
sweepVerticals.description: Which verticals to sweep in Smart Mode. Leave empty to sweep ALL. Options: beauty, supplements, fashion, accessories, food_beverage, fitness, pet, home, tech_gadgets, baby_kids

searchTerms.title: Search Terms (Manual Mode)
searchTerms.description: Custom keywords to search. Used only when Smart Mode is OFF. Each term triggers a separate search run.

filterKeywords.title: Filter Keywords
filterKeywords.description: Only keep brands whose domain or ad text contains at least one of these keywords. Leave empty to keep all brands.

targetVerticals.title: Target Verticals (Output Filter)
targetVerticals.description: Only output brands classified in these verticals. Leave empty for all verticals. Options: beauty, supplements, fashion, accessories, food_beverage, fitness, pet, home, tech_gadgets, baby_kids

country.title: Country
country.description: 2-letter country code or ALL. Common codes: US, GB, CA, AU, DE, FR, IT, ES, NL, BR, IN, MX, SE, NO, DK, PL, PT, BE, CH, AT, AE, SG, ZA

isTargetedCountry.title: Targeted Country Only
isTargetedCountry.description: When ON: shows only ads specifically targeted TO this country. When OFF: shows all ads that reached this country (broader results).

adsLimitPerTerm.title: Ads Limit Per Term
adsLimitPerTerm.description: How many ads to scroll through per search term. In Smart Mode with many terms, keep this low (20-50) to avoid very long runs.

maxBrands.title: Max Brands to Output
maxBrands.description: Cap on unique brands in final dataset

useResidentialProxy.title: Use Residential Proxy
useResidentialProxy.description: Enable Apify residential proxies to bypass Facebook IP blocking. Requires proxy credits.
